title: ProDec Hand Sander Tool for Sanding Walls, Wood and More
features: Trade quality hand tool for faster, more efficient sanding of larger areas compared to sanding blocks
Ideal for walls, wood panels and other larger areas
9.5 Inch x 3.5 Inch (235 mm x 85 mm) solid aluminium plate with wing nut-secured metal clamp system that securely holds abrasive paper in place
Dense neoprene foam underside to ensure even contact with the substrate being abraded
Comfortable heavy duty foamed plastic handle
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Power up your hand sanding This trade quality hand sanding tool is ideal for sanding larger areas such as walls and wood panels faster and more efficiently than using sanding blocks. Compatible with sandpaper, aluminium oxide and virtually all other types of abrasive paper, it features a 9.5" x 3.5" (235mm x 85mm) solid aluminium plate that gives a big surface area to cover large areas in minimal time, with metal clamps at both ends that hold the paper securely in place. A simple wing nut tightening system grips the paper tightly, so you can concentrate on sanding rather than worrying about the paper slipping and sliding around, and also enables you to change sheets in seconds. The plate has a dense neoprene foam underside which cushions the paper and ensures smooth, even contact with the surface being sanded for maximum efficiency. The heavy duty foamed plastic handle is robust, durable and ergonomically shaped for comfort and reduced hand fatigue. Abrasive solutions from ProDec From sanding to cleaning, ProDec has a range of products to help you prepare the perfect surface. Aluminium oxide The abrasive paper of choice used by trade professionals in preference to sandpaper. The aluminium oxide grains are more durable, have a self-sharpening action and clog less, giving high performance sanding that outlasts sandpaper by up to 10 times. ProFlex ProFlex takes aluminium oxide to the next level, replacing the standard backing paper with an ultra-flexible, crack-resistant cotton cloth, giving outstanding performance with curved and profiled surfaces by moulding effortlessly to match their shape for fast, efficient sanding. Sanding Mesh Sanding Mesh has a hi-tech mesh construction to prevent blockage, which allows sanding dust to escape through the mesh rather than clogging it. The mesh is coated on both sides with durable glass fibre and aluminium oxide abrasive, so when one side is finally spent you can simply turn it over and use the other side. It all adds up to a longer working life and faster, more efficient sanding than traditional sandpaper. Finishing Paper Fine finish abrasive paper that provides a smooth surface between coats of paint or varnish, giving the ideal substrate key for optimum adhesion. Uniformly sized grit particles eliminate sanding scratches for a perfect finish. Sanding heads Ideal for sanding larger areas such as whole walls, ceiling or floors to prepare before decorating, ProDec has sanding heads for use by hand or with an extension pole that are compatible with all types and grades of abrasive paper. Tack cloths Impregnated with a special lightly tacky resin that efficiently picks up any loose dust, lint, dirt and other debris that's often not visible to the naked eye, tack cloths ensure the surface is clean and free from contaminants, which can otherwise reduce the adhesion performance of coatings and lead to flaking and cracking. Wire brushes ProDec wire brushes feature high density rows of robust steel wire that is very effective for heavy duty cleaning and preparation of a wide variety of surfaces including wood, metal, brick, masonry, flags, steel machinery and more. Steel wool Steel wool is ideal for a range of general purpose cleaning and degreasing tasks on metal, wood and other surfaces, as well as surface preparation prior to painting. It can be moulded to any shape to enable easy abrasion or cleaning of pipes and especially irregular, contoured or hard to reach spots.
